name: igl_kappa_chr8
description: Zebrafish IGL kappa-like (IGI) cluster on chr8 — analogue of mammalian Ig light chain. Zebrafish Ig isotypes (IgM/IgD/IgZ) differ from mammalian. Intra-cluster paralog identity 70-95% in V segments; PSVs are essential for correct V-gene assignment.
expected_copy_count: 1 locus, VDJ-rearranged per B cell; ~40-50 VH/VL gene segments
